name: Cala en Bosch
description: A mid-sized developed beach beside a marina and an inland lake (El Lago) ringed by restaurants and apartments. Comfortable and well served, geared towards families rather than seekers of untouched coves.

highlights: a family beach beside the marina and the inner lagoon (El Lago)
fish and rice restaurants around the marina, facing the water
a flat seafront promenade to the Cap d'Artrutx lighthouse and Son Xoriguer
